narrative:
North Royalton-03-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 925 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.7 percentage points.
